stripped_arms.sonar: Removed from the public copy: Perplexity Sonar is a direct answer API, not a search tool inside your own agent loop, so it is not part of the comparison webfetch makes. Regenerate this arm yourself with: python evals/run_e2e_eval.py --arms sonar (needs PERPLEXITY_API_KEY).
